name: reference_probe_set_v1
description: Manual listening probe set for the first real-model reference-space checkpoint. Fill anchor and expected candidate ids from a mined candidate catalog; do not infer style from transcript alone.

probes.label: Emma Neutral 1
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a calm, controlled narrator-style clip by ear.

probes.label: Emma Neutral 2
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a second calm narrator clip from a different recording if possible.

probes.label: Emma Neutral 3
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a third calm narrator clip that still sounds like the same desired mode.

probes.label: Emma High Energy 1
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a clearly high-energy, sharp, shouted, or emotionally intense clip by ear.

probes.label: Emma High Energy 2
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a second high-energy Emma clip from a different recording if possible.

probes.label: Emma High Energy 3
probes.speaker: Emma Watson
probes.notes: Pick a third high-energy Emma clip that still belongs in the same mode bucket.

probes.label: Billie Rae 1
probes.speaker: Hey Billie Rae
probes.notes: Pick a stable Billie Rae clip for cross-speaker negative pressure.

probes.label: Billie Rae 2
probes.speaker: Hey Billie Rae
probes.notes: Pick a second Billie Rae clip from a different recording.

probes.label: Billie Rae 3
probes.speaker: Hey Billie Rae
probes.notes: Pick a third Billie Rae clip with clearly different speaker identity.
